creator: philippe.michel7@free.fr
text:
Created attachment 203103
Suggested patch

With WITHOUT_NTP=true set in src.conf, "make delete-old" does not remove /etc/periodic/daily/480.status-ntpd, causing the following spurious warning in the daily run output:

ntpd does not exist in /etc/rc.d or the local startup
directories (/usr/local/etc/rc.d), or is not executable
